goal: No unauthenticated caller can drive the agent or read company data; the principal is verified server-side, not trusted from request input.
why: Closes codebase-map HIGH-1 (unauthenticated mutating/PII API surface) and MED-1 (principal trusted from query param) by implementing ADR-001: app password + signed httpOnly session cookie carrying the verified principal.
success_criteria: App entry requires a real credential check; the pick("Wency") auto-login is removed (REQ-2).
Every API route except /api/login and the CRON_SECRET cron runner rejects unauthenticated requests with 401 (REQ-1).
The authenticated session establishes the principal server-side; body.identity and the principal query param are no longer trusted (REQ-3, MED-1).
One principal cannot read another principal's chat history regardless of query string (REQ-3).
No new npm dependency added; session signing uses Node crypto (HMAC + scrypt + timingSafeEqual).

tasks.title: Session signing/verification util + per-operator credential check
acceptance_criteria: signSession("Wency") returns "Wency.<hmac>"; verifySession round-trips it to "Wency"; a tampered token returns null.
verifyCredential returns true only for the correct per-operator password, using constant-time comparison.
No new npm dependency added; only node:crypto is imported.
tasks.action: Create src/lib/auth/session.ts exporting signSession, verifySession, getPrincipal, verifyCredential, SESSION_COOKIE using node:crypto (createHmac sha256 over SESSION_SECRET; scryptSync for password hashes; timingSafeEqual for both comparisons). Import PRINCIPALS/Principal from @/lib/openrouter/client. Add authSchema + getAuthEnv() to env.ts (SESSION_SECRET min 32, OPERATOR_CREDENTIALS JSON salt:hash map) following the existing per-feature lazy-cache pattern.

tasks.title: Route-guard proxy + POST /api/login + POST /api/logout
acceptance_criteria: Unauthenticated page requests to /, /emails, /files, /prep redirect (307) to /login.
Unauthenticated POST /api/chat or GET /api/chat/history returns 401 JSON without reaching the handler.
POST /api/login with correct credentials returns 200 + Set-Cookie aq_session (HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Lax); wrong password returns 401 with no cookie.
GET /api/mail/scheduled/run with correct Bearer CRON_SECRET still returns 200 (allowlisted).
POST /api/logout clears the cookie and returns 200.
tasks.action: Create src/proxy.ts (Next 16 renamed middleware): proxy(request) calls getPrincipal; allowlist /login, /api/login, /api/mail/scheduled/run; else null -> 401 JSON for /api/* else redirect /login. matcher excludes _next + static assets. Create src/app/api/login/route.ts (runtime nodejs): zod {principal,password}, verifyCredential, on success cookies.set signed session httpOnly secure sameSite lax maxAge 30d, else fail 401. Create src/app/api/logout/route.ts clearing the cookie.

tasks.title: Login page + replace auto-login splash in page.tsx
acceptance_criteria: /login shows a branded form: choose operator + password + submit.
Wrong password shows an inline .notice err; correct password redirects to / and chat loads as that operator.
Chat page no longer auto-logs in as Wency; identity comes from GET /api/auth/me.
Form works at 375px and 1440px; inputs/buttons >= 44px; keyboard submit; reduced-motion honored.
tasks.action: Create src/app/login/page.tsx (use client) reusing the gate/.gate-card/.pick-btn visual language; POST {principal,password} to /api/login; on ok redirect to /, else render json.error as .notice err. In src/app/page.tsx remove the pick("Wency") on-mount effect (lines 296-301); replace with an effect that GETs /api/auth/me, setIdentity from the response, and redirects to /login on 401; reuse pick(principal) for session hydration with the returned principal.

tasks.title: Read principal from session in chat + history routes; add /api/auth/me
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/chat ignores body.identity and uses only the session principal.
GET /api/chat/history (all 3 modes) scopes to the session principal and ignores the principal query param.
POST /api/chat/history persists under the session principal, not a body-supplied principal.
GET /api/auth/me returns the session principal (200) or 401 when unauthenticated.
tasks.action: chat/route.ts: replace the body.identity whitelist (lines 27-31) with identity = getPrincipal(req) ?? undefined, remove identity from the body type, 401 if null. chat/history/route.ts: replace the principal query-param parse (GET lines 36-38), POST body principal, and DELETE query param with getPrincipal(req); use it in every .eq("principal",...). Create src/app/api/auth/me/route.ts (runtime nodejs) GET returning ok({principal}) or fail("Unauthorized",401).
